purpose: Declare the plugin-supported full-application generation entrypoints and distinguish them from validation, delivery, API, proof, and sample generator helpers.

invocationContract.planningPassContinuation: When planning gates pass and business defaults are user-default-approved-for-generation, this node CLI is the callable materialization handoff for generated-final .yapk artifacts. Do not stop solely because no standalone CLI exists.
hardStops: API-issued ID manifest is missing or invalid
user explicitly requested planning-only or no package generation
invocationContract.proofBoundary: This CLI creates generated-final package artifacts only. It never signs, installs, imports, upgrades, seeds data, or runs browser/runtime proof.

entrypoints.proofBoundary: A materialized package is not signing/install/runtime proof. Generated-final preflight must pass before signing is attempted.

invocationContract.planningPassContinuation: When planning gates pass and business defaults are user-default-approved-for-generation, continue with this skill entrypoint to generate the generated-final .yapk. Do not stop solely because no standalone CLI exists.
hardStops: OAuth or workspace discovery is required and unavailable for API-issued IDs
user explicitly requested planning-only or no package generation

supportedOutputs: signing/install/runtime proof reports when explicitly authorized
entrypoints.proofBoundary: This is a Codex skill-orchestrated generator entrypoint, not a standalone CLI. It may create packages through the active plugin skills and scripts, but success requires generated-final package artifacts plus the required validators. Delivery helpers, runtime-proof generators, and sample-specific scripts do not satisfy this entrypoint.

invocationContract.planningPassContinuation: Use this supporting skill under the top-level builder flow to continue from approved planning contracts into generated-final package creation. Do not stop solely because no standalone CLI exists.
hardStops: user explicitly requested planning-only or no package generation

entrypoints.proofBoundary: This skill can participate in full app package generation under the top-level application builder flow. It is not a replacement for generated-final validators, signing proof, install proof, or runtime proof.

nonFullAppEntrypoints.reason: Delivery decision helper only; it does not generate resources or packages.
Package API upload/import/install/upgrade helper only; it requires an existing package.
Focused proof/demo generators only; they are not generic Functional Spec + App Plan to full-app YAPK generators.
Sample-specific generator; not a generic full-app generator.
